alkylation reagent: alkylated using 1 μL of cysteine blocking reagent, methyl methanethiosulfonate (MMTS)
alkylation concentration: alkylated using 1 μL of cysteine blocking reagent, methyl methanethiosulfonate (MMTS)
cleavage agent: samples were digested with trypsin (Sequencing Grade Modified Trypsin, Promega Cat#:V511A)
collision energy: Normalized collision energy (NCE) was set to 27 for fragmentation
instrument: Samples were analyzed on UPLC (Dionex The UltiMate® 3000 HPLC) interfaced with Q-Exactive mass spectrometer
labeling: iTRAQ based quantitative proteomics was done from hippocampus of Wdr13−/0 and wild-type mice
reduction reagent: treated with 2 μL of reducing agent [tris (2-carboxyethyl) phosphine (TCEP)]
reduction concentration: treated with 2 μL of reducing agent [tris (2-carboxyethyl) phosphine (TCEP)]
